policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.acceptance_tier_zh: A1 公司级结构化绝对量，可直接使用

records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: Emission Type 2021 Baseline Year Scope 1 (tCO2e) 436,267 Scope 2 (tCO2e) 1,089,730 Scope 3 (tCO2e) 58,655,441 Total 60,181,438 In connection with our net-zero commitment and submission of near-term and net-zero targets to SBTi for validation, we submitted our Scope 1, 2 and 3 baseline emissions for 2021 as per the table below: 5.1.2 Emissions Energy consumed can be converted to CO2 emissions based on regional conversion factors. In order to help us and our stakeholders better assess trends related to the emissions we generate, we track emissions “intensity” on the basis of total sales, employee headcount and aggregate square footage of our facilities and offces. These intensity metrics assist us in determining whether we are becoming more effcient by normalizing emissions on a per dollar of sales, per employee and per square footage basis. The raw data for Scope
